contentBlocks.original:
साधूनां दर्शनं पुण्यं तीर्थ भूता हि साधवः ।
कालेन फलते तीर्थ सद्यः साधु समागमः ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sādhūnāṃ darśanaṃ puṇyaṃ tīrtha bhūtā hi sādhavaḥ .
kālena phalate tīrtha sadyaḥ sādhu samāgamaḥ ..
contentBlocks.translation: It is virtuous to see sadhus. Sadhus are none but incarnations of the sacred waters. Holy waters grant fruits at the appropriate time, while fruits materialise immediately by the association with sadhus.
contentBlocks.meanings: साधूनां (sādhūnāṃ) – of the sadhus; दर्शनं (darśanam) – sight; पुण्यं (puṇyam) – virtuous; तीर्थ (tīrtha) – sacred waters; भूताः (bhūtāḥ) – are incarnations; हि (hi) – indeed; साधवः (sādhavaḥ) – sadhus; कालेन (kālena) – in time; फलते (phalate) – grants fruits; तीर्थ (tīrtha) – sacred waters; सद्यः (sadyaḥ) – immediately; साधु (sādhu) – sadhus; समागमः (samāgamaḥ) – association;
